Capital Corp plans to raise $15M through a Registered Direct Offering.

data.title: NEF reports outstanding 2025 performance: $2.5B in investments, $2.0B LIHTC production, supporting 275,000 affordable homes nationwide.
data.description: In the year 2025, National Equity Fund (NEF) achieved impressive results, bringing their total production value to close to $30 billion since their establishment. This has contributed to the creation or maintenance of around 275,000 affordable homes across the country. NEF, a prominent non-profit organization, announced these significant milestones from their operations.
U.S. STOCKS EXTEND LOSSES; DOW JONES DOWN 1%

data.title: Study by Incisiv, Toshiba, and Intel shows store adaptability key in meeting customer expectations in specialty retail.
data.description: A study conducted in Research Triangle Park, North Carolina revealed that adaptability at the store level is crucial for handling increasing complexity and meeting the growing expectations of customers. The research highlights the importance of flexibility within individual stores to respond effectively to changing market dynamics.
POWELL SENT SENATORS DETAILS ON $2.5BN FED PROJECT AFTER TESTIMONY – FT

data.title: Preliminary injunction allows Revolution Wind construction, citing radar interference; awaiting 2024 lawsuit.
data.description: In Washington, a recent federal ruling has permitted the construction of the Revolution Wind offshore project. Green Oceans has expressed concerns regarding potential radar interference that remains unresolved. Additionally, a lawsuit scheduled for 2024 is pending. The decision to proceed with the construction comes amidst this uncertainty.

data.title: Algorand's Algoland finale sees biggest VRF draw ever with 79k wallets, demonstrating native on-chain randomness for dApps.
data.description: The recent Algoland event by Algorand (ALGO) came to an end with a remarkable VRF draw involving 79,000 wallets, setting a new record. This event highlighted the platform's native on-chain randomness, which removes the need for oracle costs in decentralized applications (dApps).

data.title: Heart to Heart Hospice acquires Oklahoma City agency to expand services in the area, becoming one of the largest providers of hospice care in the country.
data.description: Heart to Heart Hospice, a prominent provider of hospice care, has broadened its reach in Oklahoma by acquiring an Oklahoma City agency. The expansion, finalized on Jan. 13, 2026, in Plano, Texas, signifies the commitment of Heart to Heart Hospice to meet the needs of the surrounding area. As one of the leading private hospice care providers in the country, this move allows Heart to Heart Hospice to further support the community and enhance its services in Oklahoma.

data.title: St. Cloud Capital invests in Integrated Diagnostic Services for acquisition of Core; a top mobile radiology/lab services provider.
data.description: A recent investment has been made by St. Cloud Capital in Integrated Diagnostic Services (IDS) for acquiring Core Analytics Lab & Radiology (Core). Core is a prominent provider of mobile radiology and laboratory services. The investment was announced in Los Angeles on January 13, 2026. The exact amount of the investment was not disclosed in the news information.

data.title: Trump criticizes Fed for raising rates despite strong economic growth. Claims tariffs revitalizing Michigan's auto industry.
data.description: President Trump criticized the Federal Reserve at a Detroit rally, pushing for lower interest rates to sustain economic growth. He emphasized tariffs as key to boosting auto jobs and factory investments. Trump denounced the Fed for raising rates despite strong economic indicators, arguing that lower rates would fortify the economy. With markets anticipating rate cuts in 2026, Trump's comments reflect a growing political influence on the Fed to align with his growth-focused agenda. This story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Lakeland Financial Corp (Nasdaq: LKFN), parent of Lake City Bank, raises quarterly dividend by 4% to $0.52 per share.
data.description: In Warsaw, Indiana, on January 13, 2026, Lakeland Financial Corporation (Nasdaq Global Select/LKFN), the holding firm for Lake City Bank, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.52 per share for the first quarter of 2026. This dividend is set to be disbursed on February 5, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of January 25, 2026. Following a 4% raise, this quarterly dividend marks an increase from the previous year's $0.50 per share payout in 2025.

data.title: Platinum-Based Catalysts market projected to reach $4.98B by 2029, with 6.6% CAGR growth. Key leaders include Sinopec Catalyst Co., BASF, Thermo Fisher Scientific, and Linde.
data.description: Dublin, business wire - The global market report on Platinum-Based Catalysts for 2025 has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The platinum-based catalysts market has shown strong growth, projected to increase from $3.67 billion in 2024 to $3.91 billion in 2025, with a CAGR of 6.6%. This growth surge is mainly attributed to factors like the automotive sector's increasing demand, stringent environmental regulations, adoption of fuel cell technology, and.

data.title: George Weiss, Hedge Fund Veteran, Recognized for Philanthropic Leadership
data.description: On January 13, 2026, George Weiss, a seasoned hedge fund professional with extensive experience in finance, is being commended for his philanthropic efforts and continued dedication to promoting education, opportunity, and community-based projects. Renowned for his decades-long career in the financial industry, Weiss stands out for his focus on giving back to society.

data.title: AIM Sports Group introduces AIM+ Platform, a fully AI-Powered digital experience for the youth sports industry.
data.description: Based in Seal Beach, California, AIM Sports Group is a prominent sports organization dedicated to improving youth sports involvement through leagues, national events, sports facility oversight, and media and technology services. The company is introducing AIM+, an innovative digital platform aimed at reshaping the intersection of technology and youth sports. AIM+ is a groundbreaking integrated digital system that aims to transform the youth sports experience for athletes, coaches, parents, fans, and recruiters. This platform is the first of its kind in the market and seeks to revolutionize how sports are experienced and engaged with.

data.title: ResearchAndMarkets.com report shows Middle East has 170+ existing data centers, with top operators including Khazna Data Centers, Saudi Telecom Company, Gulf Data Hub. UAE and Saudi Arabia are key players.
data.description: A new addition to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings is the "Middle East Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" database, which provides insights about the data center landscape in the region. Currently, there are over 170 existing data centers in the Middle East, with significant presence in countries like the UAE and Saudi Arabia. Key players in the region's data center sector include Khazna Data Centers, Saudi Telecom Company, and Gulf Data Hub, all of which rank as leading operators based on capacity. The UAE stands out as the dominant market in terms of existing data centers in the region.

data.title: Co-CEO Mike Aprile of PrideStaff named to 2026 Staffing 100 North America list by SIA, his third consecutive year.
data.description: In Fresno, California, PrideStaff, a staffing organization with national franchises, revealed that Co-CEO Mike Aprile has been recognized on the 2026 Staffing 100 North America list by Staffing Industry Analysts (SIA). This marks Aprile's third consecutive year being included on the prestigious list.
